opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My joints are screaming in agony, my muscles feel bruised all over, and I physically cannot stand up. It came on tonight and I had to crawl to my bedroom because I can't put any weight on my legs.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It got really bad over the last few hours and I'm on my own — I can't get up and the painkillers I took did nothing.

symptom_narrative.onset: over the last 12 hours or so, came on suddenly tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: about half a day this time, but I've had flare-ups like this on and off since I got sick a year and a half ago
symptom_narrative.character: deep aching, burning pain in the joints, and my muscles feel bruised and beaten up
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: honestly the worst it's been — I can't stand or put any weight on my legs
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: mostly my knees and ankles, and my wrists too — and it seems to move around between them
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes and goes in waves, much worse tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — resting a little maybe, but the tablets I took didn't touch it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to stand or put weight on my legs, and moving the joints
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I'm completely wiped out and exhausted, and my muscles ache all over like I've been beaten up
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: yeah, I get these flare-ups every so often since I had that virus about 18 months ago
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't walk or get up — I had to crawl from the lounge to the bedroom, and I live on my own so there's no one to help

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a mosquito-borne virus called Ross River, caught about 18 months ago
past_medical_history.how_managed: was told it can leave you with lingering joint pain and tiredness for a long time

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-lasting tiredness and joint aches ever since that virus

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some earlier today as well

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; the house is a bit cluttered and the bed is quite low, which makes it hard to get up when the joints are bad

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: around 96 beats per minute on my smartwatch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: wrist wearable, likely raised by the pain

objective_data_offered.value: my knees and ankles are really sore and maybe a bit puffy, but they're not bright red or hot to touch, and it's not just one joint — it keeps moving around
about 130 over 80 on a home cuff
